Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 models or 1 Helbrute.

Miasmic Malignifier.name: Miasmic Malignifier
Miasmic Malignifier.equipped_with: A Miasmic Malignifier is equipped with: Noxious stink.
abilities: Infiltrator, Mark of Nurgle
Unmanned: A Miasmic Malignifier can't contest or capture mission objectives.
Pest explosion: If the model is destroyed, it always explodes. The explosion range is 6".

Putrescent Fog: At the start of each activation, the model can create a Putrescent Fog with a "Stand & Shoot" command. To do so, place a Putrescent Fog marker (a 3" radius circle) within 7" of any friendly unit bearing the Mark of Nurgle. All enemy units treat the zone as difficult terrain and must take one Toughness test per model if they touch or move over the circle during their activation. For each failed test, the unit suffers one Mortal Wound.

Noctilith Crown.name: Noctilith Crown
Noctilith Crown.equipped_with: A Noctilith Crown is equipped with: Lashing warp energies.
abilities: Infiltrator

Unholy Conduit: A friendly unit starting its activation within 12" of the Noctilith Crown can attempt to pray to the Dark Gods. Roll 2D6. On a roll of 6+, the unit gains the effect of a prayer from the sheet "Prayers to the Dark Gods". On any roll below 6 it gets hit with the Lashing warp energies profile.
Unmanned: A Noctilith Crown can't contest or capture mission objectives.
Warp explosion: If the model is destroyed, it always explodes. The explosion range is 6".

Heldrake.equipped_with: A Heldrake is a single model and equipped with: Bale flamer; Heldrake claws.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Hover mode

equipment.desc: Before the game, select a psychic power from the general psychic powers or the Chaos psychic powers. The model can use this psychic power once per game. Roll 1D6 during the model's activation. On a 3+, the psychic power is successfully manifested with the required cast value. On a 1, the model suffers a "Perils of the Warp" attack.

One weapon of the model gains one of the following:

Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Icon of Chaos

If the arriving unit has the same Mark of Chaos as the bearer, it can instead be placed within 6". The icon must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Demagogue

equipment.name: Daemonic essence

equipment.name: Instrument of Chaos

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon

equipment.name: Spikey bits

equipment.name: Swordsman honours

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon

equipment.name: Terminator armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, a 2+ armor save, a 5+ invulnerable save and the abilities "Deep strike", "Massive(1)" and "Unyielding". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Bloodsoaked mantle
equipment.desc: Everytime the model kills an enemy Character model, a Monstrous Creature or a Vehicle, it gains +1 Strength and +1 Attack for the rest of the game.

equipment.name: Bloodstep rune

equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +2 Wounds, +1 Attack and the "Bike" unit type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Khornate rage
equipment.desc: The model gains +1D3 bonus attacks for a charge move, instead of just 1.

equipment.name: Obsidian blade
equipment.desc: The model gains Deadly(5+) on one of its weapons. If the weapon already has the rule, increase Deadly(x+) by 1. For example Deadly(5+) becomes Deadly(4+).

equipment.name: Rune of brass
equipment.desc: Psykers within 18" suffer a "Perils of the Warp" attack on each double when trying to manifest a psychic power. Additionally, they have to roll two dice and apply both peril results. Unique.

equipment.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Blind Rage" ability. Roll 2D6 for Blind Rage and take the higher result.

daemon_weapons.name: Betraying
daemon_weapons.desc: Roll 1D6 during each activation in close combat. On a 3+ you gain the rolled number as additional Attacks. On a 1 or 2 the additional attacks are directed at friendly models in direct base contact. If there are no friendly models, it will attack itself. Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Bloodied

equipment.name: Nurgling infestation
equipment.desc: The model inflicts 4 automatic hits each activation in close combat. Strength: 2 AP: 0 D:1; Poison(4+).

equipment.name: Plague ammunition
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain "Poison(3+)".

equipment.name: Plague outburst
equipment.desc: Each time the model casts a psychic power with a 7+, the nearest enemy unit within 21" suffers 3 automatic wound with Strength: 4 AP: 0 D: 1 and the "Sunder(2)" ability.

equipment.name: Revoltingly Resilient
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Regeneration(1)" ability.

equipment.name: Shamblerot
equipment.desc:
Roll 1D6 during the model's acitvation, if an enemy vehicle is within 6":
1 - Nothing happens.
2 to 4 - The vehicle suffers a glancing hit.
5 to 6 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit.

equipment.name: Zombie lord
equipment.desc: All Poxwalker models from an attached unit gain +1 Strength.

daemon_weapons.name: Entropic
daemon_weapons.desc: The weapon gains "Shieldbreaker(-3)". Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Miasmic
daemon_weapons.desc: Attacks against enemy models within 6" range gain a bonus +1 Strength. Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Rotting
daemon_weapons.desc: The weapon gains "Deadly(5+)". Unique.

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(1), Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

equipment.name: Combat Drugs
equipment.desc:
Once per battle, select any number of abilities for the model when performing a Charge command:
- +1 Attack
- +1" Charge move
- +1 Strength
- +1 Weapon Skill
- Warded
The effects last until the end of the current battle round. Roll 1D6 for each selected ability. The model suffers one Mortal Wound for each same die roll result.

equipment.name: Doom Siren
equipment.desc: Select one enemy unit within 9" range during your activation that is currently not engaged in melee and roll 3D6. For each 4+ the target suffers one automatic wound with Strength: 4 AP: -1 D: 1; Sunder(2), Suppression.

equipment.name: Needle of Desire
equipment.desc: The model can make one additional melee attack per round. Strength: 2 AP: -4 D: 1. Hits wound automatically.

equipment.name: Rapturous Standard
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Berserk(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Steed of Slaanesh
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, +1 Attack and the "Bike" unit type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Warp Scream
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit always gain the benefit of the "Hold your ground" Defensive reaction.

daemon_weapons.name: Alacritous
daemon_weapons.desc: The model gains "Deflect" and "Parry". Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Alluring
daemon_weapons.desc: Enemy models within 12" range suffer a cumulative penalty of -2 to their Leadership. Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Sinful
daemon_weapons.desc: The weapon gains "Precision(4+)". Unique.

equipment.name: Arcane compulsion
equipment.desc: Reduce enemy Charge movements targeting the bearer and their attached unit by 2".

equipment.name: Astral Grimoire
equipment.desc: Select one friendly unit within 12" during the Reinforcement phase. For the remainder of the battle round the unit got a Movement value of 12" and gains the "Anti-Grav" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Athenaean Scroll
equipment.desc: If a test to manifest a psychic power rolls any doubles, the power is manifested and can't be denied (Note: a double 1 still perils). If a test to deny a psychic power rolls any doubles, the power is denied regardless of the actual result. Unique.

equipment.name: Bringer of Change
equipment.desc: The player may demand a single die to be re-rolled each round, regardless from which player. Unique.

equipment.name: Cult initiate
equipment.desc: The model may exchange one psychic power it knows with one from the list of "Cult Powers". All Cult Powers within an army must be the same, if any is chosen. Only for models from this Codex.

equipment.name: Disc of Tzeentch
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Wound, +1 Attack and the "Jetbike" unit type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Helm of the Third Eye
equipment.desc: The model and any attached unit ignore any or all to hit modifiers, including for Defensive Fire. Unique.

equipment.name: Hourglass of Manoth
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated: 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound. 
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Talisman of Tzeentch
equipment.desc: Can be activated once per game to grant friendly and enemy psykers a +1 bonus to manifestation rolls until the next battle round. Unique.

equipment.name: Weaver of Magicks
equipment.desc:
The model may give itself one of these bonuses each round:
- Change one "Normal" psychic power to "Basic".
- Change one "Complex" psychic power to "Normal".
- Get a +1 bonus to manifest one psychic power.
- Get a +1 bonus to deny one psychic power.
Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Magical
daemon_weapons.desc: The model gains +1 to manifest and deny psychic powers. Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Warping
daemon_weapons.desc: The weapon gains a ranged profile with 18" range. It can shoot during each activation as often as the model can attack. Can't be used on a weapon with the "Slow" ability. Unique.

daemon_weapons.name: Weaving
daemon_weapons.desc: Once per battle round, the model and its attached unit can change the result of a single die roll of themselves or an enemy unit they are attacking. Unique.

equipment.name: Cranium Malevolus
equipment.desc:
Roll 1D3 during activation if an enemy vehicle is within 6":
        1 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit with AT(1).
        2 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit with AT(2).
        3 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit with AT(3).

equipment.name: Fleshmetal Exoskeleton
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Regeneration(1)" ability.

equipment.name: Siege Breaker
equipment.desc: The model may choose to make some or all melee attacks at Initiative 1, but gains +5 Strength for these attacks.

equipment.name: Baleful icon
equipment.desc: Any unit selecting this model or its attached unit as a charge target must resolve a test for dangerous terrain.

equipment.name: Crown of the Blasphemer
equipment.desc: If the model attempts to use a prayer, the roll is automatically successful.

equipment.name: Malefic tome
equipment.desc: If the model attempts to use an infernal pact, the roll is automatically successful.

equipment.name: The Scripts of Erebus
equipment.desc: If the model attempts to use a psychic power, the roll is automatically successful with the minimum cast value necessary. The model may choose to use the effect of this item.

equipment.name: The Skull of Monarchia
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit receive a +5 bonus to all combat results and the "Fearless" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Drakescale Plate
equipment.desc: Attacks against this model reduce their AP by 1.

equipment.name: Hydra's Teeth
equipment.desc: One Bolt weapon of the model gains the "Explosive", "Poison(2+)" and "Seeking" abilities.

equipment.name: Icon of Insurrection
equipment.desc: If this model is attached to a unit of Cultists, they both gain the "Blind Rage" and "Furious Charge" abilities.

equipment.name: Mindveil
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Deflect" ability. Additionally, they may always move +1D3" with any kind of order.

equipment.name: Curze's Orb
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll any one die per activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Scourging Chains
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Shred" ability with all melee attacks.

equipment.name: Stormbolt Plate
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Use cover" ability.

equipment.name: Vox Daemonicus
equipment.desc: Enemy units within 6" suffer a -1 penalty to their Leadership, to rolls to manifest psychic powers, invocations, prayers and similar abilities.

weapons.name: Heavy bolter
weapons.abilities: Unique. Only for models with the Mark of Khorne

equipment.name: Last Memory of the Yuranthos
equipment.desc: The model gains a +1 bonus to manifest psychic powers. Additionally, it knows "Burning Hands" from the Pyromancy discipline.

equipment.name: Spineshiver Blade
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model reduces its "Slow(x)" value by 1.

equipment.name: The Crucible of Lies
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll invulnerability save rolls of 1. Unique.

equipment.name: The Hand of Darkness
equipment.desc: The model may choose to make some or all melee attacks at Initiative 1, but gains +1 Damage for these attacks.

equipment.name: The Skull of Ker'ngar
equipment.desc: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique.

archetypes.name: Abaddon's Chosen
archetypes.desc:
- The army gains 3 additional HQ slots (5 in total) and must use them to field at least 4 HQ selections. Each of them must have a Mark of Chaos and all Marks must be different.
- The "Animosity of the Gods" rule does not apply for the army.

archetypes.name: All is Dust
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets access to to all units from this codex that can take the Mark of Tzeentch and all units must take it.
- The army gets access to to all units from the "Chaos Daemons" codex with the Mark of Tzeentch.
- Rubric Marines can be taken as Troops.
- Only models that already come equipped with the Mark of Tzeentch count towards the 25% limitation for Troops.
- Legionnaires can not be taken at all.
- Vehicles must upgrade Combi-bolters to Inferno combi-bolters for +2 points each, Combi-flamers to Inferno combi-warpflamers for +4 points each and Combi-melta to Inferno combi-melta for +1 point each.
- May not select any Legacy or Traits.

archetypes.name: Ambition for Perfection
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets access to to all units from this codex that can take the Mark of Slaanesh and all units must take it.
- The army gets access to to all units from the "Chaos Daemons" codex with the Mark of Slaanesh.
- Noise Marines can be taken as Troops.
- Only models that already come equipped with the Mark of Slaanesh count towards the 25% limitation for Troops.
- Legionnaires can not be taken at all.
- May not select any Legacy or Traits.

archetypes.name: Blood for the Blood God!
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets access to to all units from this codex that can take the Mark of Khorne and all units must take it.
- The army gets access to to all units from the "Chaos Daemons" codex with the Mark of Khorne.
- Khorne Berzerkers can be taken as Troops.
- Only models that already come equipped with the Mark of Khorne count towards the 25% limitation for Troops.
- Legionnaires can not be taken at all.
- May not select any Legacy or Traits.

archetypes.name: Daemonkin
archetypes.desc:
- The army gains access to all Chaos Daemon units.
- The army may use the Daemonkin table for the respective god.
- The army ignores the "Summoning" rule. 
- The army must have at least one HQ selection from each codex (Chaos Daemons and Chaos Space Marines).
- All units in the army must have a Mark of Chaos and it must be the same Mark.
- All units in the army must have or purchase the "Daemon" or "Greater Daemon" ability.
- The army may not have more than +1 unit selected from codex Chaos Space Marines over codex Chaos Daemons and vice versa.
- May not select any Legacy or Traits.

archetypes.name: Dreadclaw Assault
archetypes.desc:
- All units must start the game as passengers inside a Dreadclaw Drop Pod.
- Half of all Drop Pods in the army (round up) arrive automatically in the first battle round as reinforcements. The other half arrives automatically in the second battle round.

archetypes.name: Host Raptorial
archetypes.desc:
- Raptor units can be taken as Troops.
- Only Raptor units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.
- At least half of all Raptor models must start the game in reserves, even if the mission does not allow reserves.

archetypes.name: Legion
archetypes.desc:
- The army has access to everything from the Horus Heresy Space Marines supplement.
- Only Troops from the Horus Heresy Space Marine Supplement count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Legionnaire Warband
archetypes.desc:
- Legionnaires can be taken as Troops.
- All units in the army must be given at least one Veteran ability.
- Units who can't take a Veteran ability may not be selected.
- Marks of Chaos do not count as Veteran abilities in relation to fulfilling this requirement.

archetypes.name: Plaguehost
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets access to to all units from this codex that can take the Mark of Nurgle and all units must take it.
- The army gets access to to all units from the "Chaos Daemons" codex with the Mark of Nurgle.
- Plague Marines can be taken as Troops.
- Only models that already come equipped with the Mark of Nurgle count towards the 25% limitation for Troops.
- Legionnaires can not be taken at all.
- Frag grenades for all models are exchanged with Blight grenades at no additional cost.
- Vehicles must upgrade Combi-bolters for +2 points each to gain "Poison(4+)", Combi-flamers to Combi-plague belcher for +4 points each and Combi-melta for +2 points each to gain "Poison(4+)" on the bolter part .
- May not select any Legacy or Traits.

archetypes.name: Sorcerer Circle
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets 4 HQ slots in total and has only access to Chaos Sorcerers and Masters of Sorcery as HQ models. Chaos Sorcerers gain the "Command squad" ability.
- All of these models must be set up within 12" of each other. 
- While a Master of Sorcery is within 12" of a Chaos Sorcerer, they can manifest all powers known to the Chaos Sorcerer and receive a +1 bonus to manifesting and dispelling psychic powers.

archetypes.name: Special Operations
archetypes.desc: - Cultists must pick two Veteran abilities, one of which has to be "Infiltrator".

archetypes.name: The Swift Blade
archetypes.desc:
- Chaos Bikers can be taken as Troops.
- Outflanking units may be deployed on turn 1.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Arch Traitor
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Word Bearers Armory.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Hydra
legacies.desc:
The army has access to the Alpha Legion Armory.
Can only select units with no Mark or the Mark of Chaos Undivided.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Iron Lord
legacies.desc:
The army has access to the Iron Warriors Armory.
Can only select units with no Mark or the Mark of Chaos Undivided.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Night Haunter
legacies.desc:
The army has access to the Night Lords Armory.
Can only select units with no Mark or the Mark of Chaos Undivided.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Warmaster
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Black Legion Armory.

traits.name: 10.000 Years of Horror
traits.desc: The unit ignores negative leadership modificators. Only for creature units.

traits.name: Black Crusade
traits.desc: One chosen HQ model simultaneously bears all four Chaos god marks (Khorne, Nurgle, Slaanesh, Tzeentch). That HQ pays the combined mark cost for all four gods. Other units may carry 0 or 1 mark as normal. Animosity rules are suspended for the entire army.

traits.name: Blood Feud
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Desecration
traits.desc: The unit gains a 5+ invulnerability save while within 6" of an objective. Doesn't work against weapons with strength 8 and above.

traits.name: Fallen
traits.desc: The unit gains the "They Shall Know No Fear" ability (See Space Marines). Only for creature units.

traits.name: Hatred Unleashed
traits.desc: The unit's ranged attacks against the nearest enemy unit gain +1 to hit rolls.

traits.name: Horrors of the Night
traits.desc: The unit gains +1 to hit and +1 to wound in melee against units with at least one Battleshock token or if the enemy unit is outnumbered.

traits.name: Iron Within, Iron Without
traits.desc: Creature models gain a 6+ invulnerability save. Vehicles repair either one Engine Damage or Weapon Damage on themselves during each Rally phase. Only for creature models that do not already have an invulnerability save from their datasheet or Armory.

traits.name: Laboratory Experiments
traits.desc: The unit gains the ability "Berserk(5+)", +1 Strength and +1" Movement. At the end of each activation roll a D6 per model. For each 1 the unit suffers 1 Mortal Wound.

traits.name: Malicious Volley
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Bolt weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

traits.name: Masters of Deception
traits.desc: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: Mixed Warband
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Profane Zeal
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Blind Rage" ability. Only for creature units.

traits.name: Siege Experts
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Superior Battle Tactics
traits.desc: The unit reduces any negative to hit modificators by 1.

traits.name: Terror Tactics
traits.desc: All melee attacks of the unit gain the "Gruesome" ability. The unit itself gains the "Terrifying(-1) ability.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Pyric Flux
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The target adds +2 to the Strength for all weapons with the "Flames" ability.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Tzeentch's Firestorm
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: Roll 1D6 for each Wound left in the target unit. On a 3+ it receives an automatic wound with S: 4 DS: 0 D: 1; Seeking.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Doombolt
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: One automatic hit with S: 9 AP: -3 D: 2; AT(3), Seeking, Tank hunter.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Glamour of Tzeentch
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The target gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Weaver of Fates
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The target may re-roll 1s for its invulnerability saving throws.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Temporal Manipulation
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The caster may heal a friendly unit (excluding itself) with the Mark of Tzeentch for 1D3 wounds. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Dark Hereticus.name: Diabolic Strength
Dark Hereticus.effect: The target gains +4 Strength and the "Decimate" ability for melee attacks.

Dark Hereticus.name: Death Hex
Dark Hereticus.effect: Attacks against target unit gain the (cumulative) Shieldbreaker(-1) ability.

Dark Hereticus.name: Infernal Gaze
Dark Hereticus.effect: Roll 2D6. For every 4+, the target suffers one Mortal Wound.

Dark Hereticus.name: Prescience
Dark Hereticus.effect: The target receives a +1 bonus to all hit rolls.

Dark Hereticus.name: Bastion of Chaos
Dark Hereticus.effect: Attacks against the target suffer a -1 penalty to wound rolls.

Decay(Nurgle only).name: Gift of Contagion
Decay(Nurgle only).effect: The target suffers a -1 penalty to its Toughness. "Poison(x+)" attacks gain a +1 bonus to wound rolls.

Decay(Nurgle only).name: Miasma of Pestilence
Decay(Nurgle only).effect: Enemy models attacking the target in melee reduce their number of attacks by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

Decay(Nurgle only).name: Decaying Touch
Decay(Nurgle only).effect: The target suffers a (cumulative) â€“1 penalty to its Saving throw or Armor value.

Decay(Nurgle only).name: Plague Wind
Decay(Nurgle only).effect: Each model of the target must succeed on a Toughness test or receive one Mortal Wound.

Decay(Nurgle only).name: Nurgle's Dance
Decay(Nurgle only).effect: The caster may heal a friendly unit (excluding itself) with the Mark of Nurgle for 1D3 wounds. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Excess(Slaanesh only).name: Pavane of Slaanesh
Excess(Slaanesh only).effect: Roll 1D6 for each Wound left in the target unit. On a 3+ it receives an automatic wound with S: 4 DS: 0 D: 1; Seeking.

Excess(Slaanesh only).name: Cacophonic Choir
Excess(Slaanesh only).effect: Roll 2D6 and substract the target's Leadership. The unit receives that amount of automatic wounds with Strength: 5 AP: -6 D: 1; Seeking.

Excess(Slaanesh only).name: Hysterical Frenzy
Excess(Slaanesh only).effect: The target gains +1 Attack for each model and the Precision(5+) ability for all melee weapons.

Excess(Slaanesh only).name: Siren
Excess(Slaanesh only).effect: The target unit must pass a Leadership test with a -1 penalty, or move 6" towards the caster.
Excess(Slaanesh only).duration: Until the next activation of the caster

Excess(Slaanesh only).name: Symphony of Pain
Excess(Slaanesh only).effect: The target suffers a -1 penalty to its Weapon Skill and Strength.

Malefic.name: Cursed earth
Malefic.effect: The target gains the "Aegis(4+) and "Warded" abilities. All terrain around the target within 6" is treated as difficult and dangerous for enemy units, even if they would normally ignore it.

Malefic.name: Devour
Malefic.effect: The target is destroyed. The caster gains +1 Strength and +1 Wound.
Malefic.duration: Until the end of the game.

Malefic.name: Warp marked
Malefic.effect: Friendly units gain +3" to their charge move against the target.

Malefic.name: Pact of flesh
Malefic.effect: The target regains one lost wound.

Malefic.name: Pact of steel
Malefic.effect: The target repairs one permanent damage result or regains one lost Hull point.

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Mutation: Warp Reality
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: The target unit must succeed at a Leadership test with a -1 penalty or receives 1 Battleshock token. Additionally, it is treated as if it is in difficult and dangerous terrain, even if it normally would ignore these effects.

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Prophecy: Divine the Future
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: Roll 1D6 and keep it on the side. You may use the die for yourself instead of rolling a die in the future. The die is used up afterwards. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).duration: Until the end of the game

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Time: Time Flux
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: The model may heal a friendly unit (excluding itself) within range for 2 Wounds. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Scheming: Seeded Strategy
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: The army receives a +1 bonus to rolls during the Reinfocement and Initiative phase. Stacks with itself.

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Magic: Astral Blast
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect:
Creatures suffer 1D6 automatic wounds with S:10 AP: -2  D:1; "Seeking". 
Vehicles suffer 1D3 glancing hits with AT(1)."

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Knowledge: Empyric Trespass
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: To wound rolls against the target can be re-rolled by the caster and their attached unit.

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Change: Dysmanifestation
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: The target suffers a penalty of -1 to Initiative, Attacks and Leadership (to a minimum of 1 each).

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Duplicity: Sorcerous Facade
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: The target unit is removed and immediately set up anywhere on the table. It must be at least 9" away from any enemy unit. The unit can not move anymore afterwards.

Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).name: Manipulation: Attempted Possession
Cult Powers (only for Cult initiates).effect: One model in the enemy unit is resolving its melee attacks against the own unit. Character models can't be selected.

pacts.name: Bladed Maelstrom
pacts.effect: The target unit gains 1 Battleshock token.

pacts.name: Fires of the Abyss
pacts.effect: Four automatic hits with S:5 AP:-2 D:1, Seeking.

pacts.name: Capering Imps
pacts.effect: The target unit loses all benefits from cover.

pacts.name: Glimpse of Eternity
pacts.effect: Target unit may reroll any one die.

prayers.name: Soultearer Portent
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Unholy Blessing
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Veil of Despair
prayers.effect: Enemy models suffer a -2 penalty to their Leadership.
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Illusory Supplication
prayers.effect: Hit rolls of 1-3 against target unit always fail.
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Omen of Sacrifice
prayers.effect: The caster suffers 1 wound. Return one fallen model of attached unit to the battlefield.

prayers.name: Heretical Visions
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Will of the Chaos Gods
prayers.effect: Target unit gets all benefits of all marks of chaos.
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Warp Barrier
prayers.effect: Enemy psykers must reroll successful psychic tests. They suffer a "Peril of the warp" off of all doublets.
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

prayers.name: Benediction of Darkness
prayers.effect: Models count as if they were in cover.
prayers.duration: Until the next activation of the caster

items.name: Unbound Fury
items.effect: The target unit gains the "Furious Charge" ability.
items.duration: Until the end of the current battle round

items.name: Obliteration
items.effect: The target unit gains the "Decimate" ability.
items.duration: Until the end of the current battle round

items.name: Reborn in Blood
items.effect: The target unit heals 3 Wounds +1 Wound for each additional Blood point spent on it. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first.

items.name: Blood for the Blood God
items.effect: Place a unit of 8 Bloodletters within 8" of a friendly unit with the Mark of Khorne as if they arrived via Deep strike. The unit counts as activated, but can still fight in melee on this turn.

items.name: Skulls for his Throne
items.effect: Place a unit of 1 Bloodthirster within 8" of a friendly unit with the Mark of Khorne as if it arrived via Deep strike. The unit counts as activated, but can still fight in melee on this turn.

items.name: Desecration
items.effect: If the unit is currently standing within 3" of an uncontested mission objective, you immediately gain control of it as if it was a unit with the "Objective secured!" ability.

items.name: Beautiful Death
items.target: A friendly model that has just lost its last Wound
items.effect: The target may fight (again) in melee before being removed.

items.name: Dance Macabre
items.effect: Place a unit of 6 Daemonettes within 6" of a friendly unit with the Mark of Slaanesh as if they arrived via Deep strike. The unit counts as activated, but can still fight in melee on this turn.

items.name: Diabolic Majesty
items.effect: The target must pass a Leadership test with a -2 penalty.

items.name: Protection of the Dark Prince
items.effect: The target gains "Aegis(4+)", "Warded" and can never be wounded on a roll of 1 or 2.
items.duration: Until the end of the current battle round

items.name: Violent Crescendo
items.effect: The target gains "Frenzy(2")".
items.duration: Until the end of the current battle round

items.name: Siren's Call
items.effect: Place a unit of 1 Keeper of Secrets within 6" of a friendly unit with the Mark of Slaanesh as if it arrived via Deep strike. The unit counts as activated, but can still fight in melee on this turn.

items.name: Pact from Beyond
items.when: After successfully manifesting a psychic power.
items.effect: The range of the psychic power is increased by 6" per spent CP.

items.name: Cabbalistic Focus
items.when: Before rolling to manifest or deny a psychic power.
items.effect: Add +1 to the test result for each spent CP.

items.name: Psychic Maelstrom
items.when: After successfully manifesting a psychic power.
items.effect: In addition to the power, resolve the effects of a "Smite" originating from the caster.

items.name: Residual Magic
items.when: After successfully manifesting a psychic power.
items.effect:
Select one of the following effects to apply to the caster and their attached unit until their next activation:
- Add +6" range to all ranged weapons.
- The unit gains +1 Strength.
- The unit gains a 6+ invulnerability save.

Nurgle.description: Track the total number of unsaved Wounds inflicted by units with the Mark of Nurgle. At the start of each battle round, consult the Tally of Pestilence table to determine the current bonus. All models with the Mark of Nurgle gain the corresponding characteristic boost or special rule. All bonuses stack.

items.effect: Models with the Mark of Nurgle gain +1 Strength.
Models with the Mark of Nurgle gain +1 Toughness.
Weapons with the "Poison" ability re-roll to wound rolls of 1.
Models with the Mark of Nurgle gain the "Warded" ability.
